title: Cybersecurity in Cambodia: Current Developments and Challenges Ahead
description: Analysis hosted on Open Development Cambodia describing Cambodia's cybersecurity governance (National Cybersecurity Committee, draft Cybersecurity Law, Digital Government Policy). Third-party/analytical, not a domestic institutional issuer; no explicit PQC reference.

title: Cybersecurity in Cambodia (Asia Pacific Bulletin 731)
description: East-West Center (US-based research institution) bulletin on Cambodia's cybersecurity landscape. Foreign/academic issuer; no explicit PQC reference.

title: Cambodia: Ministries should withdraw draft cybersecurity law
description: Access Now (NGO) press release on Cambodia's draft Cybersecurity Law. NGO issuer; no PQC content.

title: Cybersecurity and Data Protection in Mainland Southeast Asia 2024 — Cambodia chapter
description: Law firm (Tilleke & Gibbins) overview of Cambodia's MPTC draft Cybersecurity Law and data protection. Private-sector/consultancy issuer; no PQC reference.

title: Navigating Cloud and Cybersecurity Policies in Cambodia
description: Vendor/consultancy summary of Cambodia's Digital Government Policy 2022-2035 and Digital Economy & Society Framework 2021-2035. Vendor issuer; no PQC reference (general cybersecurity only).

title: Cybersecurity Laws: Opportunities and Challenges in Cambodia
description: Academic paper hosted on ResearchGate. Academic issuer; no explicit PQC reference.
